candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary line above EBIT, but it is a company-wide total and not clearly labeled as COGS/cost of revenues. Adding it to the selected COGS row would risk misallocation and double counting.
Operating D&A component above EBIT, but not identified as cost-of-revenues related. It appears to be part of the total D&A disclosure rather than a standalone COGS-specific add-on.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Amortization component of total D&A, with no indication it belongs specifically to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly tied to R&D, not COGS.

variables.notes: No row in the operating section explicitly identifies depreciation/amortisation as belonging to COGS/cost of revenues. The visible D&A disclosure is a separate company-wide operating line and components, not a COGS-specific bucket. Conservatively leave COGS_DA empty to avoid misallocating shared D&A into COGS.

candidates.why: Best operating-level D&A summary row above EBIT. It sits alongside the selected XSGA component rows ('Other external costs' and 'Staff costs') rather than appearing nested within them, and the prior mapping notes explicitly excluded D&A from XSGA components. Prefer the summary row over components to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Component of the total D&A line. Should not be chosen because a matching summary row exists.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related D&A component disclosed above EBIT. It appears to roll into the total 'Amortization and Depreciation' line, so it should not be selected separately when the summary row is available.
Component of the total D&A line. Do not select separately because the summary row exists.
Balancing/check row, not an expense line to add separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists only of 'Other external costs' and 'Staff costs', and prior notes say depreciation/amortization was excluded. 'Amortization and Depreciation' is presented as a separate operating expense line above EBIT at the same level, so it should be added separately. Its components sum to the same total, so only the summary row is selected.
